seoTitle: Palm & Light Coffee | Specialty Coffee in San Mateo
seoDescription: Visit Palm & Light Coffee in San Mateo for specialty coffee, seasonal drinks, pastries, and welcoming hospitality inspired by the philosophy of Palm.

hero.description: A specialty coffee laboratory in San Mateo, CA. We apply the philosophy of Palm to every roast, every pour, and every interaction.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: The pursuit of better,
story.p1: "Palm" is a Japanese philosophy that translates to "continuous improvement." It is the belief that small, ongoing positive changes can reap major improvements.
story.p2: At Palm & Light Coffee, this isn't just a name—it's the operational framework for our entire café. From the precision of our espresso extraction to the sourcing of our matcha from Kagoshima, we are obsessed with refining the details.
story.p3: We built this space in San Mateo to be a laboratory of hospitality. A place where the coffee is treated with deep reverence, but the service is always warm, approachable, and rooted in the neighborhood.

coffee.title: The Coffee
coffee.description: We partner with Black & White Roasters for our core espresso and filter offerings, ensuring a consistent, chocolate-and-berry forward profile. Our single-origin rotation highlights the best seasonal harvests from around the world.

ingredients.title: The Ingredients
ingredients.description: Our signature lattes are built on house-made syrups and sauces. We import black sesame paste and Okinawa brown sugar directly from Japan, and craft our miso caramel from scratch to achieve the perfect umami balance.

hospitality.title: The Hospitality
hospitality.description: Precision in the cup means nothing without warmth in the interaction. We believe a great café is a cornerstone of its community. We are here to remember your name, your order, and make your day slightly better.

philosophy.label: The Philosophy
philosophy.title: Palm:
philosophy.description: Every cup is an iteration. Every roast is a refinement. We apply the Japanese philosophy of Palm to the art of coffee, ensuring your daily ritual is never static, but always evolving toward perfection.

menu.title: The Menu
menu.description: A curated selection of specialty coffee, Japanese-inspired signature lattes, and elevated toast. Prepared with precision and care.

mobileBar.title: Mobile Coffee Bar
mobileBar.description: Bring the Palm experience to your private events, weddings, and corporate gatherings.

community.title: The Community
community.description: Exclusive access to seasonal drops, early invites to cupping workshops, and neighborhood events.

giftCards.title: Gift Cards
giftCards.description: Give the gift of perfection. Redeemable in-store for beans, brew gear, or beverages.
